chapter_title: 真人感窗口人像基准测试 V3

panels.scene_description: near-real full-body portrait of an East Asian woman squatting by a bright window in a red dress and black pantyhose

resolved_prompt.positive: beautiful East Asian woman, long brown-black hair, delicate facial proportions, brown eyes, natural lips, realistic eyelashes, large bright window, grey curtain, soft daylight, wooden floor, indoor natural light, airy apartment interior, full-body composition, squatting pose, looking back toward camera, clearly wearing a fitted long-sleeve red dress made of visible red fabric, dress fully covering torso, waist and hips, full black semi-sheer pantyhose covering both legs continuously from hip to ankle, no exposed bare thigh, red closed-toe high heels, soft smile, realistic skin, realistic knees and hands, bright window rim light, grey curtains, clean wood floor, shallow depth of field, natural feminine pose, very close to real photo, clothed fashion portrait, no fabric draped around body, photorealistic, realistic skin texture, realistic skin pores, cinematic daylight, soft backlight, realistic depth of field, premium texture detail, realistic photography look
resolved_prompt.negative: cartoon, 2d, painting, illustration, overprocessed beauty skin, plastic skin, low quality, worst quality, blurry, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, text, watermark, office props, smartphone, empty limbs, duplicate body parts, broken hands, anime face, heavy cel shading, exaggerated giant eyes, posterized skin, oversharpened edges, white cloth, cream cloth, beige cloth, blanket, towel, shawl, wrap dress made from loose fabric, nude shoulder wrap, exposed shoulders, off-shoulder cream garment, white dress, ivory dress, bathrobe, thighhighs, thigh-high stockings, stockings ending above the knee, garter belt, black shoes, black heels, bare upper thigh

resolved_render.notes: Prompt-tightened photoreal benchmark v3: keep the same majicMIX v7 realism setup as r02, but explicitly lock full black pantyhose from hip to ankle, red heels, and stronger negatives against thigh-high stockings, black shoes, and cream wrap drift.

narration: 这一版继续收紧：黑丝袜必须从腰到脚连续覆盖，鞋也必须回到红色。
